case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK vs. WALLETT, JANE MARIE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $104.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WALLETT, JANE MARIE
